description: Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 11 mmDial shape: RoundSteel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack leather strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleBlack coloured dial with the 12 hour, the 6 hour and the brand logo printed on the glassQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 50 meters allowing you to use it when washing your hands, in light rain etc.
